decision.archive_summary: Earlier block covered implementation/testing and CLI-based validation of context-size diagnostics. Durable requirement retained: the user needs a direct, continuously visible context-size display in the UI, without manual commands or frequent refreshes.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user question is a clarification within the same active task: making context size visible in Codex/VS Code and understanding why the implementation touches Project Assistant. Raw context still needed is the recent requirement/implementation chain around the UI behavior and the assistant’s claim that it was wired up, especially t8-t11. Older testing/verification turns are resolved and can leave the next-turn prompt. User product requirements from t6 and t8 should survive as semantic pins even if some raw turns are later compacted.
